methodology: Product OKRs that connect customer jobs, experience KPIs, commercial outcomes, and explicit team ownership.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes rather than feature shipping lists.
Key results connect usage, monetization, and trust metrics to the teams that move them.
Discoveries stay attached to operating bets so planning stays evidence-based.
